# Snap Flow Solutions

> Snap Flow Solutions is a local marketing agency built on 28 years of business ownership experience, based in Ringgold, GA and serving the greater Chattanooga, TN metro area. Founded by Chris Pearce, we help local service businesses capture every lead, automate follow-up, build their Google presence, generate 5-star reviews, and get found on AI search platforms like ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, and Perplexity. Services include lead capture and follow-up, missed call text-back, Google Business Profile optimization, local SEO, review automation, and search visibility (AEO) optimization.

## Services

- [Lead Capture & Follow-Up](https://snapflowsolutions.com/services/): Automated 24/7 call answering, instant text-back, and follow-up sequences that respond to every inquiry within 60 seconds.
- [Google Business Profile Optimization](https://snapflowsolutions.com/services/): Complete GBP setup, optimization, weekly posting, review generation, citation building, and Map Pack ranking strategy.
- [Search Visibility (AEO)](https://snapflowsolutions.com/blog/ai-search-visibility/): Optimization for AI answer engines including ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, and Perplexity so these platforms recommend your business.
- [Review Generation & Reputation Management](https://snapflowsolutions.com/services/): Automated post-job review requests, real-time monitoring, and professional response to every review.
- [Local SEO & Location Page Development](https://snapflowsolutions.com/services/): City-specific service area pages, citation building across directories, NAP consistency audits, and local search ranking optimization.

- [Lead Capture & Follow-Up](https://snapflowsolutions.com/ai-lead-capture/): Done-for-you lead capture and follow-up for small businesses — 24/7 call answering, missed call text-back, automated follow-up sequences, appointment booking, and lead dashboard for service businesses in Chattanooga and beyond.
- [Business Systems Consulting](https://snapflowsolutions.com/ai-consulting/): Practical systems consulting and implementation for small business owners — lead capture, follow-up automation, reputation management, and local marketing.
- [Search Visibility & Answer Engine Optimization](https://snapflowsolutions.com/ai-search-visibility/): Answer engine optimization (AEO) for local businesses — get your business recommended by ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and Claude through structured data, crawler configuration, content citability optimization, and brand signal building.

- [Services Directory](https://snapflowsolutions.com/services/): Full directory of all marketing services offered by Snap Flow Solutions, including lead capture and follow-up, business systems consulting, GBP optimization, search visibility, review management, local SEO, 24/7 call answering, social media video content, and landing page design.

## Locations Served

- [Chattanooga, TN](https://snapflowsolutions.com/chattanooga/): Local marketing systems and services for Chattanooga, Tennessee service businesses.
- [Ringgold, GA](https://snapflowsolutions.com/ringgold/): Local marketing systems and services for Ringgold, Georgia service businesses.
- [Dalton, GA](https://snapflowsolutions.com/dalton/): Local marketing systems and services for Dalton, Georgia service businesses.
- [East Ridge, TN](https://snapflowsolutions.com/east-ridge/): Local marketing systems and services for East Ridge, Tennessee service businesses.
- [Fort Oglethorpe, GA](https://snapflowsolutions.com/fort-oglethorpe/): Local marketing systems and services for Fort Oglethorpe, Georgia service businesses.

## About

- [About Snap Flow Solutions](https://snapflowsolutions.com/about/): Founded by Chris Pearce, 28 years of business ownership experience. Based in Ringgold, GA, serving the Chattanooga metro.
- [FAQ](https://snapflowsolutions.com/faq/): Answers to common questions about local marketing, lead capture, Google visibility, and how Snap Flow Solutions helps local businesses grow.

## Blog

- [AI Lead Generation for Small Business](https://snapflowsolutions.com/blog/ai-lead-generation/): How AI lead generation works for small businesses, what it costs compared to hiring staff or buying leads, and why service businesses are the fastest-growing adopters of AI lead generation systems.
- [AI Answering Service for Small Business](https://snapflowsolutions.com/blog/ai-answering-service/): How AI answering services work for small businesses, what they cost compared to traditional answering services, and why service businesses are adopting AI phone handling to capture leads 24/7.
- [What Is AI Search Visibility and Why Local Businesses Need It](https://snapflowsolutions.com/blog/ai-search-visibility/): How AI platforms like ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews choose which businesses to recommend, and what local businesses can do to get cited.
- [Missed Call Text-Back: Stop Losing Leads](https://snapflowsolutions.com/blog/missed-call-text-back/): How automated text-back systems respond to missed calls instantly so local businesses never lose a potential customer.
- [Google Business Profile Optimization Guide](https://snapflowsolutions.com/blog/gbp-optimization/): Step-by-step guide to optimizing your Google Business Profile for maximum local visibility and Map Pack rankings.
